title: Political rally in Riga draws massive crowds ahead of voting day
snippet_text: Top party leaders addressed a massive rally in Riga promising job creations, free electricity, and specialized sub-plans for rural developmental bounds.

snippet_text: The election filing process completed today in Riga. Multi-millionaire candidates and independent leaders enter the fray, making the contest highly unpredictable.
